channel.title: CyberNetSec - Other
channel.description: Latest other threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: AI-Powered Disinformation is Top Threat to 2028 Elections, Mandiant Warns
item.description:
A new report from Mandiant (part of Google Cloud) identifies AI-powered disinformation and influence operations as the most significant cyber threat to the 2028 U.S. election cycle. The report warns of a future filled with hyper-realistic deepfakes and AI-driven social media manipulation designed to...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Threat Intelligence, Policy and Compliance, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: "GuardFall" Flaw Lets Old Bash Tricks Bypass Modern AI Agent Security
item.description:
A new class of vulnerability named 'GuardFall' has been discovered, affecting ten out of eleven popular open-source AI coding agents. The flaw allows attackers to bypass the agents' security guards using decades-old Bash shell obfuscation tricks. By crafting malicious text in a file like a README, a...

Severity: High

Categories: Vulnerability, Supply Chain Attack, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Wipro and Palo Alto Networks Launch AI-Driven Managed Detection and Response Service
item.description:
Wipro and Palo Alto Networks have expanded their partnership to launch a new AI-driven Managed Detection and Response (MDR) service. The collaboration combines Palo Alto Networks' Cortex XSIAM platform with Wipro's CyberShield services to provide more proactive and automated threat defense for enter...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Redwood AI Enters Post-Quantum Cryptography Market with Acquisition of Quantum.IQ
item.description:
Redwood AI Corp. has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire Quantum.IQ Technologies, a Vancouver-based company specializing in AI-driven, post-quantum cryptography (PQC) solutions. The move marks Redwood AI's strategic expansion from its focus on artificial intelligence into the emerging and...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: The AI Sword: Anthropic Model Demonstrates Hacking Prowess Surpassing Human Experts
item.description:
A new AI model from Anthropic, named Claude Mythos Preview, has demonstrated the ability to autonomously find and exploit software vulnerabilities at a scale and speed that surpasses most human security experts. The model has already been used to find thousands of high-severity flaws in major operat...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Intelligence, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Maine Disables Public Data Breach Portal After Trolls Post Fake VRChat and Discord Breaches
item.description:
The Office of the Maine Attorney General has temporarily disabled its public-facing data breach notification portal after it was abused by an unknown entity. The perpetrator submitted fraudulent breach reports for the companies VRChat and Discord, claiming millions of users were affected. VRChat pub...

Severity: Low

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: "WeedHack" MaaS Targets Minecraft Players, Infecting 116,000+ Systems for Remote Access
item.description:
A Malware-as-a-Service (MaaS) operation known as "WeedHack" is aggressively targeting the Minecraft gaming community, having already infected over 116,000 systems. The malware, likely distributed through game mods or cheats, provides its operators with a web-based dashboard that gives them comprehen...

Severity: Medium

Categories: Malware, Threat Actor, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: 29 Arrested as 'Operation KRATOS 2' Dismantles Nine Illegal Streaming Networks Across Europe
item.description:
A coordinated law enforcement action spanning 13 European countries, dubbed 'Operation KRATOS 2,' has successfully dismantled nine criminal networks specializing in illegal online streaming. The operation resulted in 29 arrests and the shutdown of services that provided illicit access to copyrighted...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Other

Read Full Article →

item.title: Frame Security Launches with $50M to Combat AI-Powered Phishing and Deepfakes
item.description:
A new cybersecurity startup, Frame Security, has launched with $50 million in funding to tackle the growing threat of AI-powered social engineering. Founded by veterans of Wiz and Israel's Unit 8200, Frame is building a 'human risk security' platform. It uses AI to generate hyper-realistic attack si...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Phishing, Other, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Strategic Education Data Breach Exposes SSNs, Passports of Over 100,000
item.description:
Strategic Education, Inc., the parent company of Strayer University and Capella University, has disclosed a data breach that occurred in February 2026. The incident involved unauthorized access to its computer network, compromising the highly sensitive personal information of over 100,000 individual...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Other

Read Full Article →
